prompt: Produce a docs/DATA-MODEL.yaml in monorepo mode (two products: 'auth' and 'billing'). The PRD declares auth (Go server) with features FR-001 OIDC / FR-002 Refresh tokens / FR-003 Admin console, and billing (TypeScript server) with FR-001 Invoice generation / FR-002 Stripe integration. No UX inputs are present. Produce a valid monorepo-shaped DATA-MODEL.yaml with entities and feature traces under each product.

assertions.text: products dict has both 'auth' and 'billing' keys
No top-level theme blocks (entities/persistence/etc) at the root — only under products.<slug>
products.auth.entities has at least User and Session (or equivalent identity entities)
products.billing.entities has at least Invoice and Payment (or equivalent)
Every must_have_feature in each product is traced by at least one entity in that product
Each product has its own persistence.primary_store
Each product has its own id_strategy.scheme
validate_schema.py exits 0 on the produced file
